title: biota orientalis var. flagelliformis
intro: Biota orientalis var. flagelliformis, also known as the Japanese arrowroot or Japanese sago, is a variety of the rhizomatous plant Biota orientalis, native to East Asia. The plant's rhizomes and tubers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biota orientalis var. flagelliformis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and tubers are commonly used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
